title: TEKUBE
description: This Minecraft mod turns the game into a real immersive party experience. It allows players to organize parties in the game by adding new items and features, inspired by the culture of French Sound Systems!
body:
**_Fabric:_**

Requires the recommended [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) version for your version of Minecraft.
Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
Put Fabric API and TEKUBE in the mods folder.

**_NeoForge:_**

Requires the recommended [NeoForge](https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge) version for your version of Minecraft.
Requires [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge).
Put Kotlin for Forge and TEKUBE in the mods folder.



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



_**Main features**:_

**Sound systems**: The mod introduces subwoofers and speakers, which play music in the world of Minecraft. Players can place them to create realistic sound space.

**DJ Deck**: A virtual mixer is built in, allowing players to control the music in-game. They can make transitions like a real DJ.

**Vinyl and Music**: A selection of vinyl records is available to enrich the musical atmosphere. Players can make, collect and play vinyls to personalize the atmosphere of their party. The records include various musical genres, ranging from electro to tekno.

**Full party experience**:
The mod offers the possibility to organize festive events in multiplayer. Friends can gather to dance and interact with music equipment. Dance animations and emotes make the experience even more immersive, allowing everyone to move to the rhythm of the music.

This mod is perfect for those who want to recreate the atmosphere of parties and festivals in Minecraft, offering a unique blend of creativity and musical friendliness.



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



_**Mod User Guide**:_

- **Vinyl turntable**

  ![*](https://i.imgur.com/5ZBGWht.png)

- **Vinyl**

  ![*](https://i.imgur.com/QZ5E8CL.png)

- **Vinyl cutting**
  
  To cut your vinyl, simply equip yourself with a Stone Cutter.
  Place the vinyl in the slot on the left and choose the music you like best in the slot on the right!

- **Vinyl on the turntable**

  To play the vinyl, simply Right-click on the turntable. To stop the music, click on it.

- **Speaker system**

  To craft a box, equip yourself with the Stonecutter.
  Place a Note Block in the left slot and choose one of the available models!



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Congratulations, now you know how to play the perfect party-goer!

Feel free to give me feedback on your experience

**_And remember: you can't stop people who dance._** ;)
